scripts.android-full-deploy: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew clean && ./gradlew assembleDebug && adb install -r app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk && cd ..
scripts.ios-full-deploy: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && cd ios/App && xcodebuild clean -workspace App.xcworkspace -scheme App -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' && cd ../.. && npx cap sync ios
scripts.sync-android: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.sync-ios: npm run build && npx cap sync ios
scripts.clean-ios: cd ios/App && xcodebuild clean -workspace App.xcworkspace -scheme App -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' && cd ../..
scripts.rebuild-android: npm run clean-android && npm run sync-android
scripts.rebuild-ios: npm run clean-ios && npm run sync-ios
scripts.build-android-release: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew clean && ./gradlew bundleRelease && cd ..
scripts.build-ios-release: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && cd ios/App && xcodebuild clean archive -workspace App.xcworkspace -scheme App -configuration Release -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' -archivePath build/App.xcarchive && cd ../..
